sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data_1 (population Float64) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO test_data_1 SELECT randUniform(1.0, 10.0) FROM numbers(500);
CREATE TABLE test_data_2 (population Float64) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO test_data_2 SELECT randUniform(1.0, 10.0) FROM numbers(500);
SELECT stddevPopStable(population) AS stddev FROM test_data_1 UNION SELECT stddevPopStable(population) FROM test_data_2;
